description: Playwright for the Windows desktop, from Bun — drive native GUIs via UI Automation + MCP.
name: io.github.ObscuritySRL/umbriel

environmentVariables.description: Capability profile: 'readonly' (inspect/read only), 'safe' (read + input + window — default), or 'full' (also os + fs tools).
environmentVariables.name: UMBRIEL_PROFILE

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to allow the 'os' tools (launch_app/run_program/open_path, kill_process, manage_process, control_service, set_env, registry_get/registry_list/registry_set) AND the 'fs' tools (read_file/write_file/list_dir/stat_path/make_dir/copy_file/move_file/delete_file) regardless of profile.
environmentVariables.name: UMBRIEL_OS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated tool names or categories to additionally allow on top of the profile.
environmentVariables.name: UMBRIEL_ALLOW

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated tool names or categories to deny, overriding the profile and UMBRIEL_ALLOW.
environmentVariables.name: UMBRIEL_DENY

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'never' to forbid the real-cursor fallback entirely (strictly cursor-free). By default clicks/drags are cursor-free but fall back to the real hardware cursor when no cursor-free path exists.
environmentVariables.name: UMBRIEL_CURSOR

environmentVariables.description: Sandbox root directory that the fs-category file tools (read_file/write_file/list_dir/stat_path/make_dir/copy_file/move_file/delete_file) are confined to when fs tools are enabled; open_path's path argument is honored too.
environmentVariables.name: UMBRIEL_FS_ROOT

environmentVariables.description: File path to journal every mutating tool call as JSON Lines (tool, category, masked args, ok, observation); secret-bearing args and values are redacted. Unset = no trace.
environmentVariables.name: UMBRIEL_TRACE

environmentVariables.description: Controls the default-on stderr audit of mutating tool calls. 'off' is the explicit opt-out (reported at startup); 'verbose' also audits reads.
environmentVariables.name: UMBRIEL_AUDIT

environmentVariables.description: Credential masking (default on). 'off' opts out; a regex value overrides the built-in secret shapes masked in clipboard/env/registry reads and the trace journal.
environmentVariables.name: UMBRIEL_REDACT
